## ENVELOPE (Optional — Anti-Loop Safeguards)

_If absent, the task runs without anti-loop tracking (legacy/manual dispatch)._

|------------------------|--------------------------------|

| Current Hops           | [0]                            |
| Mode                   | [EXECUTE / ARCHITECT / SUPERVISE] |
| Escalated              | [YES / NO]                     |

| Consecutive Successes  | [0]                            |
